title: Chronicles of Arcadia: A Journey to Magitech [CAJM]
description: Try to survive in a fantasy world that will try in every possible way to prevent you from surviving and without a rational approach you will not succeed! To make life easier, you can create plants powered by kinetic energy or electric power, or create your
body:
# Description
![The intersections of magic and technology](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1d6da62ec7972f7fbe8c82491a80779bd23e50a.png)

**In this world**, you can safely pursue only one path of development by playing along the branch of magicians or technicians, because both sides are strong enough to resist the techno-magical world.  
But in any case, you will have to face difficulties from both industries!  
- Fight against magical monsters that outnumber you many times in strength
- Travel to new, previously unexplored dimensions
- To delve into the exact sciences, which is comparable to magic
- Create huge factories for car farms




---

> **This mod pack** pursues the idea of the coexistence of magicians and technicians. Each added mod adds something unique to this world and does not force different sides to compete, allowing you to combine both. 

> **You can either** use magic for defense, or create your own unique virus that facilitates part of the game, or create a cannon and add your individual intelligence to it.

>**The build aims** to complicate the passage at the beginning of the game by adding new mobs aimed at opposing the player, and slowing down the passage, making it more difficult to get into different dimensions and obtain metal objects by adding a melting system. 
 
> **When the player** is sufficiently responsive, it will be difficult for him to adapt to the world around him: mobs strengthen with him, and further development forces him to travel more and come up with various mechanisms to optimize the process of existence. 

---

  **P.S**. *And when you come to the end of the game, routine difficulties will stop looking for you, but this does not mean that they are no more, exploring the world, you will come across various dungeons, difficult bosses, and interesting puzzles.*


# Mod pack plans

![Enviroment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8454c08eef4e863c7095eb42de0be7864c12e95.png)

### Soon in the build
- Custom mod: meltn metals for create your own weapon with special abilities (_replace the Silent Gear_)
- A quest tree that will guide you through intricate mechanics and explain their details and new features.
- Plot: Story quests, NPCs, bosses, buildings, and much more that will lure you into a mysterious world.
- Custom crafts that force you to explore and combine different mods
- Ambient musick: special soundtracks  for background music
- Improve the balance of the game in the areas of crafting, abilities, enemies and loot

**P.S.** *All updates will be developed only in the author's free time,  <ins>no exact dates until they are announced by the author himself.</ins>*
